TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kishida Fumio Kishida Fumio (ryax sa 29 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1957 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Japan ta' misuw hya' ga Kishida Fumio, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Kishida Fumio minkahul sa Shibuya, Tokyo na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1957 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: kis~ɕħi*a *umio kis~ɕħi*a *umio (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *apan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kis~ɕħi*a *umio, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral kis~ɕħi*a *umio minkaħul s~ɕa s~ɕħiβuja, tokjo na *apan. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
S.FORM: Kishida Fumio Kishida Fumio (ryax sa 29 na byacing tay 7 squ kawas na 1957 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Japan ta' misuw hya' ga Kishida Fumio, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Kishida Fumio minkahul sa Shibuya, Tokyo na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1957 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *apan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kis~ɕħi*a *umio, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral kis~ɕħi*a *umio minkaħul s~ɕa s~ɕħiβuja, tokjo na *apan. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
